title.zh: 中国玩具进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國玩具進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China toy compliance under GB 6675 / CCC against Canada's CCPSA, Toys Regulations SOR/2011-17, Surface Coating Materials Regulations, Phthalates Regulations, bilingual labelling rules, and Canada market-access duties.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国GB 6675 / CCC玩具合规与加拿大CCPSA、玩具条例SOR/2011-17、表面涂层材料条例、邻苯二甲酸酯条例、英法双语标签规则及加拿大市场准入义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國GB 6675 / CCC玩具合規與加拿大CCPSA、玩具條例SOR/2011-17、表面塗層材料條例、鄰苯二甲酸酯條例、英法雙語標籤規則及加拿大市場准入義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Health Canada determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Toy manufacturers, exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Canadian federal law, provincial language rules, product-specific hazards, and recall/reporting duties with qualified professionals before placing toys on the Canadian market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、加拿大卫生部裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。玩具制造商、出口商、进口商及经销商在将玩具投放加拿大市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行加拿大联邦法律、省级语言规则、产品特定危害以及召回/报告义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、加拿大衛生部裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。玩具製造商、出口商、進口商及經銷商在將玩具投放加拿大市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行加拿大聯邦法律、省級語言規則、產品特定危害以及召回/報告義務。

answer_first.en: Canada has no CE-style single toy mark. The main gaps versus China GB 6675 / CCC are CCPSA importer duties, Toys Regulations mechanical and flammability rules, separate Canadian chemical limits for surface coatings and phthalates, and bilingual English/French consumer labelling.
answer_first.zh: 加拿大没有类似CE的单一玩具标志。相较中国GB 6675 / CCC，主要差距是CCPSA进口商义务、玩具条例下的机械和可燃性要求、加拿大单独的表面涂层和邻苯二甲酸酯化学限值，以及英法双语消费者标签。
answer_first.zht: 加拿大沒有類似CE的單一玩具標誌。相較中國GB 6675 / CCC，主要差距是CCPSA進口商義務、玩具條例下的機械和可燃性要求、加拿大單獨的表面塗層和鄰苯二甲酸酯化學限值，以及英法雙語消費者標籤。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
